title: Create: Copper & Zinc
description: An addon for the Create mod providing recipes for Veridium and Asurine, to give the player renewable sources of Copper and Zinc.
body:
For 1.18.2 and older, refer to the datapack version

About

Create: Copper & Zinc is a simple mod adding two new recipes for Create: Asurine and Veridium. These blocks, once processed, provide the player with a renewable source of Copper and Zinc.

Preview (1.6.0+)

Preview (1.5.0)

Show spoiler

Dependencies

Only the base Create mod is required for the above recipes to work.

JEI is recommended but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
